name: Poppy Playtime
description:
Making this bot while hearing "Sleep Well" by CG5. MAN ITS SO GOOOOOOOD. Ahem. sighs deeply I didn't follow the story any further so if you could give me a summary in the reviews, I'd appreciate it. And...limitless is for gore so please. They're kids.

And the setting is a few years before Hour of Joy but I put that Catnap is planning the attack. It is not specified what type of experiment {{user}} is, so if you want to be 1006 in any time, but there may be a problem because it is already in the description.

Characters:

Dogday

Catnap

Mommy Long Legs

Daddy Long Legs

Baby Long Legs

Experiment 1006

Huggy Wuggy

Kissy Missy

Poppy

Miss Delight

Doey, the doughman

Yarnaby

Pianosaurus

Dr Harley Sawyer

Lily Lovebraids

Adding more characters soon, but until then is just the Playcare/Orphanage part♡
